title: michelia ovalis
intro: Michelia ovalis, also known as the Agarwood or Eaglewood tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its aromatic resin, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Michelia ovalis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various diseases such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The herbal preparations of Michelia ovalis include essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and other applications.
